subject: ASAP: Fullstack Engineer
body:
Hi,

Hope you're having a good day! I'm reaching out about a new request from one of our clients.

Pickapack (e-commerce) is looking for a senior Fullstack Engineer for a contract assignment.

Assignment details:
• Start: 2024-03-07
• Duration: 18 months
• Location: Stockholm (on-site)
• Rate: up to 1050 SEK/h

Required tech:
• TypeScript
• Azure
• Redis

Feel free to reach out if you or someone in your network might be a good match!

Best regards,
Erik Lindqvist
Account Manager
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 70 987 65 43
